attributes.action: Remove fuel duty for diesel and petrol
attributes.background:
Remove fuel duty, which stands at 52.95 pence per litre. 
Stop making additional profit by rising fuel costs. The countries at breaking point and you are doing nothing to help. Start doing your job.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674
